texto: Life is All About How you Handle Plan BPlan A is always my first choice.You know, the one whereEverything works out to beHappily ever-after.But more often than not,I find myself dealing withThe upside-down, inside-out version --Where nothing goes as it should.It's at this point that the realTest of my character comes in..Do I sink, or do I swim?Do I wallow in self pity and play the victim,Or simply shift gearsAnd make the best of the situation?The choice is all mine...Life is all about how you handle Plan B.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Suzy Toronto que provoca sentido da existência e experiência vivida. Ao questionar “Life is All About How you Handle Plan BPlan A is always my first choice.You know, the one whereEv…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre motivacao, humor, inspiracional, com foco em inspiracao e trabalho.
